ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station where the observation was recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "time_pdt" TEXT /* Time of the observation in PDT */,
  "air_temp_f" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "wind_dir_speed" TEXT /* Wind direction and speed */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in mph */,
  "total_precip_in" REAL /* Total precipitation in inches */,
  "solar_rad_w_m2" REAL /* Solar radiation in W/m² */,
  "dew_point_f" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "rel_hum_percent" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "atm_pressure_inhg" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in inches of mercury */,
  "download_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was downloaded */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Flag or score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used to collect the data */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor, if applicable */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather condition at the time of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorologists" (
  "meteorologist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorologist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the meteorologist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the meteorologist */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station associated with the meteorologist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the meteorologist */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the meteorologist within the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorologist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorologists_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the event was recorded */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of weather event (e.g., storm, flood) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Description of the areas affected by the event */,
  "causes" TEXT /* Causes of the event */,
  "references" TEXT /* External references or links to more information about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather observation being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the data */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the download */,
  "download_type" TEXT /* Type of data being downloaded (e.g., raw, processed, summarized) */,
  "download_format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded data (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the downloaded file */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image representing the weather condition */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)
